arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali gesture shows Newcastle United true colours as fight for Wembley hotels kicks off
arts.sum: Sandro Tonali illuminated St James' Park with a classy midfield display for Newcastle United and brought the goals to keep the Magpies on the road to Wembley! But Brentford were caught napping five minutes later as Tino Livramento attacked down the right with his cross half-cleared by Nathan Collins.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United duo hit with instant Carabao Cup bans and will miss semi-finals
arts.sum: Indeed, both Fabian Schar and Bruno Guimaraes must serve bans after picking up yellow cards in the quarter-final win over Brentford at St James' Park. Longstaff sat out of the victory over Brentford after reaching the limit on yellow cards in the competition.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United 3-1 Brentford: Highlights, man of the match, stats as Sandro Tonali stars
arts.sum: Newcastle United record a commanding 3-1 win over Brentford with a dominant performance in the EFL Cup on Wednesday night, securing their place in the semi-finals.

arts.ttl: When is the Carabao Cup semi-final draw as Newcastle United beat Brentford
arts.sum: Newcastle will discover their opponents for the semi-finals on Thursday evening following the culmination of Tottenham Hotspur's clash with Manchester United. Newcastle United fans are dreaming of Wembley once again after their side reached the semi-finals of the Carabao Cup on Wednesday evening.

arts.ttl: Newcastle United player ratings as star earns 10/10 as man of the match and others score 9
arts.sum: Two goals from red hot Sandro Tonali set the tone for Newcastle in the first half before Fabian Schar put the lid on things. Brentford did pull a late goal back from Yoane Wissa but United had done the hard work as they continued their excellent cup run.

arts.ttl: How to watch Newcastle United vs Brentford? Sky Sports+, TV channel, live stream, kick-off time
arts.sum: Highlights from all of the Carabao Cup quarter-final bouts will be available to watch on YouTube shortly after each game via the Sky Sports Football channel. Newcastle United will be eager to pick up from where they left off when they face Brentford in the Carabao Cup quarter-final.

arts.ttl: Sandro Tonali’s double helps Newcastle beat Brentford to secure semi-final spot
EXCLUSIVE: Newcastle eye January move for Barcelona defender Eric Garcia
arts.sum: Newcastle are interested in signing Eric Garcia of Barcelona in the January transfer window, FootballTransfers has been told. In addition to Newcastle, we are told that Chelsea are also in the market for a centre-back this January, with Garcia among their list of potential targets.

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Newcastle watching Evan Mooney as St Mirren rising star sees EPL transfer interest ramp up
arts.sum: The Buddies are aware of rising interest in their teen starlet

arts.ttl: 'I'm told he is': £60m player is available to sign from Newcastle as Arsenal urged to go for him – journalist
arts.sum: Arsenal’s need for a new striker has been well-documented in recent months. Indeed, Arsenal need a new number nine, and they have been linked with...
